query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(paid_at, '%Y-%m') as month,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(amount) as total_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365' AND paid_at >= '2026-04-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(paid_at, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_rows, SUM(amount) as grand_total FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'ff365';
